name: Five Point Holdings, LLC
business: Five Point Holdings is an owner and developer of mixed-use planned communities in California, also operating a residential asset management platform providing capital solutions to the U.S. homebuilding industry.

exposures.sentence: We are an owner and developer of mixed-use planned communities in California.
We also operate a residential asset management platform providing capital solutions to the U.S. homebuilding industry.
We own approximately 16,000 acres adjacent to our Valencia community in Ventura County that are primarily used for agriculture and energy operations.

catalysts.event: Begin construction on next phase of infrastructure at Candlestick
catalysts.sentence: We have commenced engineering for the next phase of infrastructure at Candlestick and expect to begin construction in the first half of 2026.
